name: Light
description: Basic protection with near-zero false positives. Good for everyday family use.

name: Recommended
description: Solid middle ground. Blocks a wide variety of trackers, telemetry, malware, and ads without significantly breaking the modern web.

name: Extreme
description: Maximum security. Blocks the most threats, malware, advanced tracking, and telemetry. May require manual whitelisting for some services.
